briefs.title: Langley City Council Land Acknowledgement — No Business Impact
briefs.summary: Langley City Council will open its April 27, 2026 meeting with a land acknowledgement recognizing the traditional unceded territory of the Katzie, Kwantlen, Matsqui, and Semiahmoo First Nations. This is a ceremonial statement only and does not propose any bylaw, regulation, or requirement affecting local businesses.

briefs.title: Council to Observe April 28th National Day of Mourning for Injured Workers
briefs.summary: Langley City Council will hold a moment of silence at its April 27, 2026 meeting to mark April 28th — Canada's National Day of Mourning. This day honours workers who have been killed or injured on the job and is observed across the country each year.
briefs.action_required: Consider pausing on April 28th to recognize the Day of Mourning with your own team.

key_dates.label: National Day of Mourning — workers killed and injured on the job
